name: calculate
description: Perform arithmetic calculations (add, subtract, multiply, divide, percentage). Use this for any math instead of guessing numbers.

expression.description: A mathematical expression using +, -, *, /, %, and parentheses. E.g. (4500 + 1520 + 18000 + 500) - (820 + 380 + 200)

name: list_transactions
description: View recent income and expense transactions for the business.

name: list_inventory
description: View all inventory items and their current stock levels.

name: get_insight_card
description: Generate a weekly Taglish insight card identifying the biggest expense and trend compared to last week.

name: check_overspending
description: Check if total expenses exceeded total income this week. Returns a plain-language alert if overspending is detected.

name: add_transaction
description: Add a new income (inc) or expense (exp) transaction with description and amount.

type.description: inc = money in, exp = money out

cat.description: Category (Supplies, Labor, Utilities, Rent, Transportation, Marketing, Miscellaneous)

name: delete_transaction
description: Delete a transaction by its ID number.

id.description: The ID of the transaction to delete

name: add_inventory_item
description: Add a new inventory item with name, quantity, unit, and optional minimum stock threshold.

unit.description: Unit of measurement (pcs, kg, box, pack, bottle, sachet, liter, pair)

name: set_stock_threshold
description: Set or update the minimum stock threshold for an inventory item to trigger low-stock alerts.

item_id.description: The ID of the inventory item

name: add_customer
description: Save a new customer record with name and contact information.

name.description: Customer full name or business name

name: set_financial_goal
description: Set a financial goal with a target amount and deadline for the AI to monitor.

name.description: Goal name, e.g. '₱50,000 net profit by December'

name: check_goal_progress
description: Check how close you are to reaching your financial goal based on current earnings.

name: forecast_cashflow
description: Generate a 30-day cash flow forecast based on recent transaction patterns.

name: check_tax_deadlines
description: Check upcoming BIR quarterly tax deadlines and estimated percentage tax due.

name: check_restock_needs
description: Check which inventory items are below their minimum stock threshold and need restocking.
